subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] mm: bypass mmap_miss heuristic for VM_EXEC readahead

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Approved the patch, noting that it fixes a specific issue on arm64 and does not affect other architectures.

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: Approved the patch, noting that it fixes a specific issue on arm64 and does not affect other architectures.

2026-04-02.patch_summary: The patch addresses a problem where the mmap_miss heuristic disables VM_EXEC readahead on arm64 due to an inactive decrement path. It excludes VM_EXEC VMAs from the mmap_miss logic, similar to how VM_SEQ_READ is already excluded.
